creator: eimar.koort@tutamail.com
text:
Hi,
I think this is related with all other iwn related problems in Fbsd-10 and
thus does not need extra ticket. Also seems, that connecting to hidden wifi
is not the problem as i initially thought.

See
https://wiki.freebsd.org/10.0OutstandingWork
https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-wireless@freebsd.org/msg01994.html
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=kern/185425
for example.

So i think this PR can be closed.
--
Eimar Koort
